en_title: 'We've Been Going Full Speed Ahead for Over 11 years': Nintendo Explains Why It Hasn't Made Splatoon 4 — Yet
cn_title: 任天堂解释为何尚未推出《斯普拉遁4》
subtitle: 先用衍生作拓展新玩家

paragraphs.en: Nintendo's brand new Switch 2 exclusive Splatoon Raiders is receiving rave reviews — but where's Splatoon 4? Speaking in a behind-the-scenes interview, the series' developers have explained why they wanted to launch a co-operative spinoff first.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂全新Switch 2独占游戏《斯普拉遁 涂击队》广受好评——但《斯普拉遁4》在哪里？系列开发者在幕后访谈中解释了为何想先推出一部合作玩法衍生作。

paragraphs.en: Launched in 2015 for the ill-fated Wii U, the very first Splatoon survived the turmoil of that console generation to become one of Nintendo's most successful new franchises in recent years. Switch sequels Splatoon 2 and 3 quickly followed... until Nintendo surprised fans by confirming that Splatoon Raiders would be next.
paragraphs.cn: 初代《斯普拉遁》于2015年登陆命途多舛的Wii U，挺过那一代主机的动荡，成为任天堂近年来最成功的新系列之一。随后Switch迅速迎来《斯普拉遁2》和《斯普拉遁3》……直到任天堂出人意料地确认，下一部作品会是《斯普拉遁 涂击队》。

paragraphs.en: Primarily single-player, Raiders is an action RPG that eschews the franchise's typically hectic ink-based multiplayer brawls for an experience that focuses on its shooter mechanics, boss battles and story. And this was all a deliberate consideration, producer Seita Inoue has said, to bring in new players to the franchise at a key point.
paragraphs.cn: 《斯普拉遁 涂击队》以单人游玩为主，是一款动作RPG。它舍弃系列一贯混乱激烈的墨水多人对战，转而聚焦射击机制、Boss战和剧情。制作人Seita Inoue表示，这是团队在关键节点为系列吸引新玩家而有意作出的选择。

paragraphs.en: "We've been going full speed ahead for over 11 years since the series' launch, developing and updating three titles along the way," Inoue explained, via a Nintendo Ask the Developer interview. "We thought it might be interesting to create something with a slightly different approach to gameplay, where you can really savor the action on your own. Splatoon isn't just about competitive play; it also includes cooperative modes like Salmon Run and a single-player Story Mode.
paragraphs.cn: Inoue在任天堂「开发者访谈」中解释道：「系列推出以来，我们已经全速前进超过11年，期间开发并更新了3部作品。我们觉得，做一款玩法思路稍有不同、让玩家能够独自细细体验动作乐趣的作品或许会很有意思。《斯普拉遁》并不只有竞技玩法，也包含‘鲑鱼跑’等合作模式和单人故事模式。」

paragraphs.en: "So, one of our motivations for developing this game was our desire to create a new entry point into the series by releasing these non-competitive elements not just as a secondary feature, but as a standalone spinoff. That said, we will continue to develop competitive gameplay going forward. That's why we developed this game as a spin-off and not as 'Splatoon 4'."
paragraphs.cn: 「因此，我们开发本作的动机之一，是把这些非竞技元素从附属功能提升为独立衍生作，为玩家创造进入系列的新入口。不过，我们今后仍会继续开发竞技玩法。这就是我们把本作做成衍生作，而不是《斯普拉遁4》的原因。」

paragraphs.en: It's hard not to hear of the Splatoon team developing more competitive gameplay possibilities and not think Splatoon 4 will be on the way eventually — though Nintendo has not said where the series will head next. For now, there's plenty of adventure to be had in the Spirhalite Islands with the Deep Cut gang, as Raiders tasks players to once again go into battle against the dreaded Salmonids.
paragraphs.cn: 听到《斯普拉遁》团队还在探索更多竞技玩法，很难不让人想到《斯普拉遁4》终有一天会到来——尽管任天堂尚未透露系列下一步方向。眼下，玩家可以先与鱼浆帮在螺旋矿岛展开大量冒险；《斯普拉遁 涂击队》将让大家再次迎战可怕的鲑鱼族。

paragraphs.en: "Splatoon Raiders is an incredibly well-designed action RPG with an expertly executed loop," we wrote, rating the game as a 9/10 in IGN's Splatoon Raiders review . "Its deep customization, challenging battles, and sheer variety make it the best Splatoon campaign yet and one of the top games on Switch 2."
paragraphs.cn: IGN在《斯普拉遁 涂击队》评测中打出9/10分并写道：「这是一款设计极其出色、玩法循环执行得炉火纯青的动作RPG。深度自定义、富有挑战的战斗和惊人的多样性，让它成为迄今最优秀的《斯普拉遁》战役，也是Switch 2上的顶尖游戏之一。」

opus_summary: 任天堂表示，开发《斯普拉遁：涂击队》是为了把合作和单人元素做成独立衍生作，为系列吸引新玩家。团队仍会继续探索竞技玩法，但尚未正式公布《斯普拉遁4》。
